a.xlink:title: Registers a maneuver with the maneuver scheduler. To be called from a maneuver server....
Returns whether a given maneuver can immediately execute.
Returns whether a given maneuver can execute later.
Pushes an item to the queue.
Getter for the combined drone awareness simple type by copy.
Evaluates whether a maneuver can be executed given an awareness.
Get whether a maneuver is being executed or pending.
Returns the expected combined drone awareness upon completion or failure of given maneuver type,...
Get copy of the currently executing maneuver. The currently executing maneuver is of type MANEUVER_TY...
Returns the expected combined drone awareness upon completion or failure of given maneuver type,...
Gets the vector of maneuvers in the queue.
